name: I have no witnesses or docs, just AI notes from my injury—can I still sue in NYC?
description: Tough without real proof—AI notes make it worse, likely lose.[1]

mainEntity.name: I have no witnesses or docs, just AI notes from my injury—can I still sue in NYC?

acceptedAnswer.text: Tough without real proof—AI notes make it worse, likely lose.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Weak case; AI hurts more than helps due to discoverability.[1][3] NY requires prima facie negligence proof; AI inconsistencies fatal.

**Key factors:**
- Need medical/police basics.
- AI speculative, not evidence.
- High dismissal risk.

Pursue if strong facts; bolster with ER records. Avoid AI in filings.[1] Lawyer assesses viability free.
